title: Fireside Chat: How Aztec Will Build Products That Make Users Private | NoirCon 3 Devconnect 2025
description:
Web3 has a product problem and privacy shouldn’t come at the cost of usability.

In this fireside chat, Joe Andrews, Co-founder of Aztec, and Claire Kart, CMO, discuss how Aztec is building products, infrastructure, and go-to-market strategies that have already served 100k+ users and are designed to scale privacy to millions more.
